nodes.context: New York-based Mafia family; John Gambino was a made member and captain.
Faction of the Gambino crime family led by John Gambino and his brothers, based in Cherry Hill, New Jersey.
Sicilian Mafia clan from Palermo, headed by Salvatore Inzerillo; allied with the Gambinos.
Sicilian Mafia faction led by Totò Riina; fought the Inzerillo-Gambino clan in the Second Mafia War.
Heroin trafficking network linked to the Inzerillo-Gambino clan.
Sicilian Mafia clan involved in heroin trafficking; received half of a 400-kg heroin shipment.

edges.context: The Cherry Hill Gambinos were a faction within the Gambino crime family.
The Inzerillo clan and the Gambino brothers formed a transatlantic Mafia clan based in Palermo and New York.
The Corleonesi nearly exterminated the Inzerillo clan during the Second Mafia War.
The Inzerillo-Spatola-Gambino network smuggled heroin into the US.
The Cuntrera-Caruana clan received half of a heroin shipment, while John Gambino took the other half.
